# Appendix
Details of our methods and challenges for reproducibility and transparency.

## Data Collection

### NPORS
Downloaded from Pew Research Center website (add more detail)

Example: for 2025, downloaded at this link:
* https://www.pewresearch.org/methods/dataset/2025-national-public-opinion-reference-survey-npors/


### NORC
Downloaded from Ropers (add more detail)

Example: downloaded at Roper iPoll (describe what this source is, where the data came from)


### SAVE Act
CAP (a PDF file)
Pew Research Center



## Data Cleaning

### NORC
Insert Kylie's cleaning steps

### NPORS
Dropped X columns per year
Transformed X columns per year

Challenges of NPORS data cleaning: lack of uniformity across years in their variables or at least their variable names

### SAVE Act 
Directly copied from CAP estimates
